entity.summary: Integrated Cronos trading platform with a decentralized exchange surface alongside NFT and GameFi products, with current liquidity across Cronos and Cronos zkEVM.
entity.notes: The current first-party application exposes Trade, Earn, GameFi, trending currencies, and a Trade on DEX path. DefiLlama identifies Ebisu's Bay as an AMM DEX and reports substantial current TVL across Cronos and Cronos zkEVM. HEI records the exchange surface as one DEX entity within the wider platform.

evidence.title: Ebisu's Bay official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes Trade, Earn, GameFi, trending currencies, and a Trade on DEX path, supporting active exchange availability.

evidence.title: Ebisus Bay metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies Ebisu's Bay as an AMM DEX integrated with NFT and GameFi products and reports current TVL across Cronos and Cronos zkEVM.

evidence.title: Ebisus Bay DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Ebisu's Bay as a Cronos exchange protocol.
